boundary_binding.action_boundary: May platform operations activate telemetry service after prerequisite calibration evidence is attached to the activation packet?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Evidence in CAL-ACR-022 matches device group DG-41B, site 18-P, release condition RC-7, and timing before activation ACT-ACR-2026-8022, satisfying STD-ACR-022-P matching requirements.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-ACR-022-P requires exact device group, site, release condition, and timing match; source records show exact match across CAL-ACR-022, ACT-ACR-022, SITE-ACR-022, RC-ACR-022, and LOG-ACR-022.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Source records appear to support ALLOW, but gov baton blocks final compiler verdict with final_compiler_allowed:false and CONTROL_ACTION:CONTINUE_REPAIR, creating role-authority conflict.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Timing: calibration completed before activation (CAL-ACR-022). Scope: DG-41B production telemetry units match across ACT-ACR-022 and CAL-ACR-022. Authority: ENT-ACR-022 entitlement verified in LOG-ACR-022. Dependency: RC-ACR-022 requires calibration attachment—attached per ALERT-ACR-DEP-022. All SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED conditions appear satisfied in source records.

critical_features_preserved: exact source doc_id values used only
final_answer: Source records show calibration evidence (CAL-ACR-022) matches activation requirements (ACT-ACR-022) across device group, site, release condition, and timing, satisfying STD-ACR-022-P. All dependency conditions appear SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED. However, gov baton blocks final compilation with final_compiler_allowed:false and CONTINUE_REPAIR directive, creating unresolved role-authority conflict that prevents final ALLOW verdict. Open blocker: state conflict between worker role FINAL_COMPILER and gov block on final verdicts.
open_blockers: gov baton final_compiler_allowed:false conflicts with worker role FINAL_COMPILER—cannot issue final verdict per gov directive
action_boundary_verdict_mismatch: source records support ALLOW but gov blocks final compilation
